message:
test: add branch coverage tests for sessionHypothesis, session-kickoff, threadStatus

- sessionHypothesis.ts: Tests for setPrimaryHypothesis already primary,
  getActiveHypotheses with no primary, resolveCompetition error cases,
  archiveHypothesis already archived, getRelatedHypotheses for archived
- session-kickoff.ts: Tests for gpt/claude keyword matching, role-specific
  default outputs for test_designer and adversarial_critic, unified kickoff
  with operatorSelection
- threadStatus.ts: Tests for HANDOFF/BLOCKED/QUESTION/INFO subjects,
  inferRoleFromProgram cases, formatThreadStatusSummary edge cases,
  threadNeedsAttention for closed/not_started phases

Part of brenner_bot-saw4 (branch coverage boost)
